svg.text: Combining keyword + semantic + metadata for the best of all worlds

text.tspan: only thing that gives binary filters
fast, exact match on rare terms
great for product names, codes, IDs

svg.text: 3. Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) — only ranks matter, not scores

g.text: how much does being #1 dominate the final ranking?
RRF cares only about rank positions, not the raw similarity scores behind them.
how much of the final score comes from each retriever?
Exact-match heavy (code, IDs, legal)? Lower β. Fuzzy intent (support, search)? Raise β.
top_k... every step is a knob.

text.tspan: After RRF, a cross-encoder reranks the top ~50 (Cohere Rerank 3, Voyage rerank-2, BGE/Jina rerankers, Mixedbread).
(Anthropic) prepends doc context to each chunk before embedding → ~50% fewer retrieval failures with no infra change.
(ColBERT, ColPali for vision) keep per-token vectors — bridges keyword precision with semantic recall in one model.
— LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini) issue their own search queries iteratively. Hybrid retrievers are now tools an agent calls.
— Weaviate / Qdrant / Pinecone / Vespa / Turbopuffer / Elastic all ship native BM25 + vectors + filters + RRF out of the box.
